name: Orange Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, and allspice.
2. Stir in the chocolate chips.
3. Add the brown sugar, white sugar, and orange juice in order, beating well after each addition.
4. Lightly oil non-stick cookie sheets.
5. Drop the batter by the teaspoonful onto the cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes until lightly browned.
7. Cool on wire racks.
